activeGoal: Formalize agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/schema as DataObject ELM-DATA-STIX-ARGO-SCHEMA; link ELM-FUNC-VALIDATE-EVENT-
designSummary: Schema-driven contract architecture approved for ELM-001. The brownfield design formalizes agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/schema/ as aggregate DataObject ELM-DATA-STIX-ARGO-SCHEMA, links existing event/result validation functions to that DataObject, introduces a shared schema contract catalog software unit for cross-cutting schema resolution and schema-derived Pydantic v2 models, and extends existing mock adapter, result assembler, python listener boundary, and JS STIX native tool modules to enforce strict typed parsing and assembly without raw dict/stdout passthrough.
designDecisions: ADR: Model agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/schema/ as a single aggregate ArchiMate DataObject ELM-DATA-STIX-ARGO-SCHEMA instead of many graph nodes because the requirement treats the directory as the single contract source shared by validation, model generation, and JS boundary enforcement.

ADR: Reuse existing brownfield ownership boundaries in services/mock_opencti_adapter, services/result_assembler, services/python_listener, and agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/tools/stix_query.js; introduce only one new software unit services/stix_contracts for shared schema-derived contract typing because no current module cleanly owns cross-cutting event/result schema resolution.

ADR: Default Python contract model framework is Pydantic v2. Dataclass event entities and bare dict result boundaries are deprecated as final contract types; strict validation failures must surface at Python and JS boundaries rather than being silently coerced.

ADR: The JS native tool boundary must parse stdout as JSON and validate command-specific payload structure before returning. Raw stdout passthrough is prohibited even when the upstream CLI exits successfully.

issues.details: IntentNotVerified: commit 64af873e4c7736b8dd855c8a5824df74eb9e194a lacks tagged automated verification for ELM-001, ELM-FUNC-GENERATE-SCHEMA-DERIVED-PYTHON-CONTRACTS, and ELM-FUNC-VALIDATE-STIX-QUERY-CLI-OUTPUT. Reality scanner verifiedIntentIds only include ELM-APP-PROC-THREAT-COLLAB-SKILL, ELM-TECH-ARTIFACT-AGENT-DEFS, ELM-TECH-ARTIFACT-OPENCODE-WORKSPACE, and REQ-OPENCODE-MULTIAGENT-THREAT-INTEL-001. QA must add tagged automated tests before release can continue.

issues.summary: Remote client alias resolution not backed by workspace config
issues.details: Validation of commit 64af873e4c7736b8dd855c8a5824df74eb9e194a found a regression in the affected listener boundary. services/python_listener/remote_client.py resolves canonical main-agent aliases from agent_app/opencode_app/.opencode/opencode.json, but that file does not define agent_aliases. As a result resolve_main_agent_alias('ThreatIntelliganceCommander', repo_root) returns the legacy alias instead of ThreatIntelPrimary and tests/test_python_listener.py::test_default_main_agent_is_canonical_and_legacy_aliases_resolve fails. Local-only QA ran because live_environment_ready=false; 跳过了真实环境验证.

Traceable automated tests now cover ELM-001, ELM-FUNC-GENERATE-SCHEMA-DERIVED-PYTHON-CONTRACTS, ELM-FUNC-VALIDATE-STIX-QUERY-CLI-OUTPUT, and ELM-DATA-STIX-ARGO-SCHEMA in tests/test_python_listener.py, tests/test_stix_contracts.py, and tests/test_opencode_workspace_config.py. Remaining note: Pydantic warns that AssemblyContract.schema shadows BaseModel.schema, but this did not cause test failures.

Rework closes the prior IntentNotVerified gaps: reality scanner verifiedIntentIds now include ELM-001, ELM-DATA-STIX-ARGO-SCHEMA, ELM-FUNC-GENERATE-SCHEMA-DERIVED-PYTHON-CONTRACTS, and ELM-FUNC-VALIDATE-STIX-QUERY-CLI-OUTPUT.
